title: Document text lines shift around and out of order!
excerpt:
Why does the content in my Monday docs constantly move around??? Lines shift and the text I’ve created moves out of order. This is not text that has been cut and pasted into the Monday doc. 
Sometimes when I enter, a who…

posts.author: JenZucconi (Jennifer Zucconi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Why does the content in my Monday docs constantly move around??? Lines shift and the text I’ve created moves out of order. This is not text that has been cut and pasted into the Monday doc.

Sometimes when I enter, a whole line will move to the end of the document. At other times, I’ve gone back into a document to find the lines reordered.

Please help! Thanks!!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @JenZucconi! This definitely sounds strange and not expected! Have you had the chance to reach out to support@monday.com for our tech team to investigate?

posts.author: JenZucconi (Jennifer Zucconi)
posts.cookedHtml: I will do that. Thank you @BiancaT!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: No problem! Keep me updated on how you go with this!
